title: hieracium subvandasii
intro: Hieracium subvandasii, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Hieracium subvandasii include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Hieracium subvandasii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
